### Field-Specific Dependencies Summary

**Fields commonly referenced (NOT to be changed lightly):**
- `Page.id` (pk) - used everywhere
- `Page.title` - display, Slug generation, indexing, logging  
  **Dependents:** EditView.title, all admin UI, search, logging
- `Page.slug` - URL construction, slug uniqueness checks  
  **Dependents:** URL routing, slug validation, redirect generation
- `Page.url_path` - hierarchical URL path, descendant updates  
  **Dependents:** URL routing, redirect signal handlers, Page.route()
- `Page.path` (treebeard) - tree structure  
  **Dependents:** Tree operations, descendant_of, ancestor_of, etc.
- `Page.depth` - tree depth, permission checks  
  **Dependents:** Permissions, tree operations
- `Page.live` - publishing status  
  **Dependents:** API .live(), search filtering, public serving
- `Page.content_type` - Django ContentType, polymorphism  
  **Dependents:** Specific() queries, ContentType lookups
- `Page.owner` - ownership tracking  
  **Dependents:** Permissions, page_permission_policy
- `Page.locked_by` - lock status  
  **Dependents:** Lock checking, permissions
- `Page.translation_key` - translation grouping  
  **Dependents:** Translation system
- `Page.locale` - language locale  
  **Dependents:** Translation, i18n queries
- `Page.latest_revision` - revision reference  
  **Dependents:** Revisions, workflows
- `Page.alias_of` - alias relationship  
  **Dependents:** Page alias logic
- `Page.first_published_at`, `Page.last_published_at`, `Page.latest_revision_created_at` - timestamps  
  **Dependents:** Search, admin listing, filters

**Treebeard fields (migrating to satellite models will be painful):**
- `Page.path` - required for treebeard MP_Node structure
- `Page.depth` - required for tree depth
- `Page.numchild` - cached child count

**Relationships commonly used:**
- `Page.revisions` - GenericRelation to Revision
- `Page._workflow_states` - GenericRelation to WorkflowState
- `Page.comments` - related_name from ParentalKey
- `Page.group_permissions` - related_name from GroupPagePermission
- `Page.view_restrictions` - related_name from PageViewRestriction
- `Page.subscribers` - related_name from PageSubscription
